The 2026 edition of Dubai Sports World, organised by Dubai World Trade Centre in collaboration with Dubai Sports Council, will run daily from 19 June to 25 August 2026. This year’s edition will feature more than 40 courts and pitches spanning 300,000 square feet and nine core sporting activities, including a 1km indoor running track and a dedicated cycling academy.

Emirates SkyCargo announces that it will be launching dedicated weekly freighter flights on its Boeing 777F aircraft to Almaty International Airport, Kazakhstan, commencing 16 June 2026. Almaty is Emirates SkyCargo’s first destination in Central Asia and the new weekly cargo flights from Dubai will help open a new trade corridor integrating the region into the carrier’s global network.

Iran's Foreign Ministry has condemned US strikes on southern Iran in the early hours of Wednesday as a flagrant violation of the UN Charter, confirming Iranian Armed Forces struck US assets in the region in retaliation.
Iran's IRGC struck a U.S. airbase in Al-Azraq, Jordan, on Wednesday, hitting four key targets, including F-35 fighter shelters and a command and control centre with long-range solid-fuel missiles.

RT by @DXBMediaOffice: RT by @DXBMediaOffice: I met with leaders of Sweden's Ministry of Health and Social Affairs as part of an official visit aimed at strengthening partnerships and exchanging expertise in healthcare, social welfare, and integrated care. We believe that investing in people’s health and well-being is an investment in the future of societies. With this vision in mind, we discussed opportunities for cooperation in developing more sustainable and resilient healthcare and social welfare systems, and explored how innovation and proactive policies can help enhance quality of life and build healthier and more prosperous communities.
